choose.otherwise: AND ( TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%') OR CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%') )

mapper.select: /** 온라인 민원 게시판 토탈카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_inqry WHERE 1 =1
/** 온라인 민원 게시판 상세 조회 */ SELECT * FROM t_inqry WHERE IDX=#{idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(IDX),0)+1 IDX FROM t_inqry
/** 온라인 민원 게시판 등록 */ INSERT INTO t_inqry (IDX,TITLE,CONTENT,ANSWER,STATUS,AGREE_GB,PASSWORD,CONTACT,EMAIL,REG_NK,REG_ID,REG_NM,REG_DTIME,MOD_ID,MOD_NM,MOD_DTIME) VALUES (#{idx},#{title},#{content},#{answer},#{status},#{agreeGb},#{password},#{contact},#{email},#{regNk},#{regId},#{regNm},#{regDtime},#{modId},#{modNm},#{modDtime})
